817004466.jp_real: リュウの力を使いこなしているようだな
817004466.en_literal: You seem to be mastering the power of the dragon.
817004466.english: Seems you've grown accustomed to your powers.

36662668.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
36662668.jp_real: 相変わらずそこがしれないな。君の力は。
36662668.en_literal: As always, I can't fathom your power.
36662668.english: I fear your potential knows no bounds.

888342087.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
888342087.jp_real: 素晴らしい集中力だ、ソーン。

923094136.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
923094136.jp_real: この天使の力は、空のために。
923094136.en_literal: This angel's power... for the sake of the sky.
923094136.english: The power of these wings serves the skies.

1020165092.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
1020165092.jp_real: これほどの数の獲物を同時に操るとは、大したものだ。
1020165092.en_literal: To control this many targets at once... impressive.
1020165092.english: To control a full flock of blades as if it were nothing... you have my respect.

432622777.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
432622777.jp_real: 因果を喰らう技か。興味深い。
432622777.en_literal: So you're going to hit me with a counter move? How interesting.

687320327.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
687320327.jp_real: そのイカズチ、魔法によるものでないと考えると、驚異的だな。
687320327.en_literal: That lightning... It's incredible, especially if it's not magic.
687320327.english: If not magic, then how is that lightning generated?

847506032.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
847506032.jp_real: 実にパワフルな攻撃だな
847506032.english: That was quite the powerful blow.

681450359.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
681450359.en_literal: Six dragons' darkness... the denial of shadows?
681450359.english: Black of the six dragons, with domain over darkness.

303974320.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0000
303974320.jp_real: ミナと共にあればこそ、恐るるものなど何もないさ。
303974320.en_literal: With everyone by my side, there's truly nothing to fear.
303974320.english: The unity of our crew bolsters me.

89373486.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
89373486.jp_real: これからも頼むぞ、ラカム。
89373486.en_literal: I'm counting on you from now on, Rackam.
89373486.english: May we claim many victories in the battles to come.

241162250.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
241162250.english: Perhaps our lessons were too strict.

860594824.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
860594824.jp_real: ああ、このペースを維持しよう
860594824.english: I'm assuming that's a good thing.

330010918.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
330010918.jp_real: ふん。それで相手が従ってくれたなら苦労はしないが。
330010918.en_literal: Hmph. If the opponent just follows along, then I won't have to go to the trouble.
330010918.english: An appropriate combination should dissuade our foes.

819056973.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
819056973.jp_real: 羽の中に隠れていたぞ
819056973.en_literal: You were hiding in the wings.
819056973.english: Get out of my wings, boy! Out!

671990439.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
671990439.jp_real: ああ。だがくれぐれも無理はするなよ。
671990439.english: Understood. But mind your own health as well.

974416455.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
974416455.jp_real: エンテイの期待には応えられたかな？
974416455.en_literal: Did I live up to your expectations?
974416455.english: High praise from the Lord of Flames.

598727564.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
598727564.jp_real: ふん、そのセリフそのまま返すよ
598727564.en_literal: Hmph. I'll return that line to you.

170746144.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
170746144.en_literal: This power... use it for me.
170746144.english: My power is yours. Use it wisely.

515321467.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
515321467.jp_real: チャーカサナイデクレ

599628456.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
599628456.jp_real: そして人を生かすのが、君の刃というわけだな。
599628456.en_literal: So your sword's purpose is to protect people, huh?
599628456.english: And yours is the edge betwixt life and death.

402485246.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
402485246.jp_real: ありがとう。頼りにさせてもらう。
402485246.en_literal: Thank you. I'll rely on you.
402485246.english: Thank you. Your empathy is welcome.

248640493.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
248640493.jp_real: おだてても何も出ないぞ
248640493.en_literal: Even if you're all worked up, nothing's gonna come of it.
248640493.english: Your flattery won't work on me.

1006730814.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
1006730814.en_literal: You're the one who's going to say that?
1006730814.english: No less merciful than a reaper.

952400612.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
952400612.jp_real: その呼び方はやめてくれ

845142331.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
845142331.jp_real: 君らと力を合わせればこそだ
845142331.en_literal: If we combine our powers with yours...
845142331.english: The consequence of fusing our powers, no doubt.

1046976060.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
1046976060.jp_real: おい！ドサクサでおかしな名で呼ぶんじゃない！
1046976060.en_literal: Hey, don't call me by some weird name like that!
1046976060.english: Call me by that name again, and I'm leaving.

382169174.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
382169174.jp_real: あ、ああ、あとで用意しよう。
382169174.english: You had that brewing for a while, didn't you?

1016628175.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
1016628175.en_literal: I won't let you get away!

1052902312.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
1052902312.jp_real: ほう。楽しみにしておこう
1052902312.en_literal: Oh, I'll look forward to it.

810967789.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
810967789.jp_real: ああ、存分に戦ってくれて構わない
810967789.en_literal: Ah, I don't mind if you fight to your heart's content.
810967789.english: Yes. Battle to your heart's content.

1071180892.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
1071180892.jp_real: ユーステス、強さには相応の責任が伴うものだからな。
1071180892.english: Yes, for power corrupts when left to its own devices.

401745291.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
401745291.jp_real: 君がこちらに合わせてくれたのだと思うが
401745291.en_literal: I think you've come here to meet me.
401745291.english: All because you adapt so well to my techniques.

1056209226.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
1056209226.jp_real: ああ、悪くなかったのでは？

249127350.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_water_1
249127350.jp_real: ブルーデトネーション！

944647528.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_wind_1
944647528.jp_real: エアロデトネーション！

434206146.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_wind_2
434206146.jp_real: ランカイのテンペスト！

753160835.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_name_upper_3
753160835.jp_real: ハァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァ

153417347.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_1
153417347.en_literal: Let the sound of judgment echo!
153417347.english: Let judgment ring across the land!

315398249.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_2
315398249.jp_real: すべての災厄に終止符を！
315398249.en_literal: I'll put an end to all the worst.
315398249.english: Such mindless chaos shall not stand!

217478901.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_3
217478901.jp_real: 極細い羽根の力を、今ここに！
217478901.en_literal: The power of the ultimate spring! Here and now!
217478901.english: By these radiant wings, we shall prevail!

593517339.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL0800
593517339.jp_real: サンダルフォン：分かっている！

1008407084.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL0900
1008407084.english: I'll give it everything I've got!

588935351.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL1200
588935351.en_literal: I'll clean this up for you!

943219287.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL1400
943219287.en_literal: I won't let you get away with this!

101120154.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL1800
101120154.jp_real: サンダルフォン：全滅する！

719469254.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL2900
719469254.en_literal: For the sake of the sky!

95643294.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_upper_1
95643294.jp_real: 願いを、約束を、俺は守る！
95643294.en_literal: I'll protect your wishes and promises!
95643294.english: Your wish, your promise... I have not forgotten!

873391533.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_upper_2
873391533.jp_real: あなたとの約束を果たしてみせる！
873391533.en_literal: I'll fulfill my promise to you!
873391533.english: I made you a promise... and I intend to keep it!

803157399.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_upper_3
803157399.jp_real: 願いの灯火は消させない！
803157399.en_literal: I won't let the light of my wish go out!
803157399.english: The light of promise shall not die!

304634319.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_lc_B_2
304634319.en_literal: Will you link up with me?

1030256201.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
1030256201.en_literal: I'll make it easy for you right away.

761331576.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_C
761331576.jp_real: エイイイイ、熱くるしい！

772873360.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
772873360.jp_real: 少しはやるようだがな
772873360.en_literal: You're actually putting up a bit of a fight, huh?
772873360.english: It seems he knows something of combat.

608413025.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
608413025.jp_real: ヒョウムのギンロウ！通らせてもらうぞ！
608413025.en_literal: I'll let the silver light of the sword pass through!
608413025.english: Listen well, wolf. You will let us pass.

211636236.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
211636236.jp_real: この程度のやから、敵ではない！
211636236.en_literal: This is nothing but a mere nuisance. Not an enemy.
211636236.english: Hold fast! It poses no threat to us.

217556516.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
217556516.english: We won't fall for these parlor tricks!

452684924.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_C
452684924.en_literal: I've got a good grip on it!

448707260.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
448707260.en_literal: That sword... it's a bit too much.
448707260.english: Now her swords present a problem.

896131297.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
896131297.jp_real: わかりやすい弱点で助かる！
896131297.en_literal: I'll be saved by an obvious weakness.
896131297.english: Thankfully, its soft spots are obvious.

610434995.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
610434995.jp_real: 全員！上空からの飛来物には注意してくれ！
610434995.en_literal: Everyone, be careful of falling debris from above!
610434995.english: Everyone, watch the skies for incoming missiles!

115095128.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
115095128.jp_real: よし！弱点を攻め続けるぞ！
115095128.en_literal: Alright! Let's keep pressing the weakness!

1034292734.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
1034292734.jp_real: 最後まで油断するなよ！
1034292734.en_literal: Don't let your guard down until the very end!
1034292734.english: We're almost across the finish line!

231286084.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_B
231286084.jp_real: 引いている！このままやるぞ！

664056375.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
664056375.english: We'll end this one way or another!

691144605.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
691144605.jp_real: 結着の時だ！全力で行くぞ！
691144605.en_literal: It's time to settle this! Let's go all out!
691144605.english: It's now or never! Give it everything you've got!

708146993.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
708146993.jp_real: ふん、見かけより脆いのでは
708146993.en_literal: Hmph. You're more fragile than you look.
708146993.english: Hmph. They're more fragile than they appear.

427490792.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
427490792.jp_real: ふっ、動きは読みやすい
427490792.en_literal: Hmph. Your movements are easy to read.

118853069.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
118853069.jp_real: 意思を持たぬ機械人形など、相手にならん！
118853069.en_literal: A mindless automaton has no right to be my opponent!
118853069.english: Soulless automatons are no match for us!

131681047.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
131681047.jp_real: 手つくずに帰るといい！
131681047.en_literal: You'd better turn into scrap metal!

829470532.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
829470532.jp_real: 話し合いには応じないか…
829470532.english: We could've talked through our differences, but alas.

494137171.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
494137171.en_literal: You're really getting on my nerves!
494137171.english: I won't suffer this continued pestering!

569320750.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
569320750.jp_real: 引くわけにはいかない！

232533761.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
232533761.jp_real: おろかな。俺たちに勝てるとでも？
232533761.en_literal: Foolish... You think you can defeat us?
232533761.english: You fools hope to defeat us? Absurd.

350137661.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
350137661.en_literal: Don't let up on the offense!

761110377.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
761110377.jp_real: ルリアを返してもらおう！
761110377.english: Return Lyria to us or suffer!

343795892.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
343795892.en_literal: Don't you dare look down on us!
343795892.english: You will pay for your sins!

435035895.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
435035895.jp_real: モハヤオクレワトラン
435035895.english: We can't let him delay us!

27561034.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
27561034.en_literal: I'll cut you down! Unleash the final blow!

286937906.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
286937906.jp_real: この力…どういうことだ…
286937906.english: That power... what has he become?

131880976.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
131880976.en_literal: There has to be a way out.

178524181.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
178524181.en_literal: Let's go! Keep pressing the attack!

458885606.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
458885606.en_literal: Don't let the winning streak slip away!
458885606.english: Victory is ours for the taking!

418218954.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
418218954.jp_real: 大丈夫だ！俺がついている！

450604498.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
450604498.jp_real: まるで虚を斬っているようだ
450604498.en_literal: It's like I'm cutting through an illusion.
450604498.english: It's like cutting through the void itself!

679797696.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
679797696.jp_real: 迷っている暇はないぞ！

665309461.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
665309461.jp_real: 邪魔をするなら排除するだけど！
665309461.en_literal: If you're going to interfere, I'll just eliminate you!
665309461.english: Impede us at your own doom!

418963782.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
418963782.jp_real: くっ…奴め、何を考えている！
418963782.en_literal: You fools... what are you thinking?!

26220751.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
26220751.jp_real: やつらの形態に合わせて対処しなければ！
26220751.en_literal: I have to adapt my strategy to his form!
26220751.english: We must lay waste to this corrupted beast!

176519547.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
176519547.jp_real: ウツロナコオリゴトケシテヤル！

992763040.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
992763040.jp_real: 俺たちも遅れを取るわけにはいかないな！
992763040.en_literal: We can't afford to fall behind either!
992763040.english: We won't turn tail and run! Not from you!

328858550.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
328858550.jp_real: スピーディーに片付けよう！

138950083.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
138950083.jp_real: ウツロナホノオメ！ウチケス！
138950083.english: We shall extinguish your horrific flames.

879356960.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
879356960.jp_real: ふん、もはや恐れるものはない
879356960.en_literal: Hmph. There's nothing left to fear.
879356960.english: Fear no longer binds us, beast!

204004086.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
204004086.jp_real: 星の民のエゴに付き合う道理はない！
204004086.en_literal: I have no reason to indulge the ego of the people of the stars!
204004086.english: No Astra will sacrifice the skies on our watch!

754497827.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
754497827.jp_real: ここで食い止める！絶対にだ！
754497827.en_literal: I'll stop you here! Not again!
754497827.english: We will stop you! Whatever it takes!

297603785.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
297603785.jp_real: この青い空は、必ず守る！
297603785.en_literal: I will definitely protect this blue sky!
297603785.english: The sky realm is under our protection!

656522998.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
656522998.jp_real: ひとりよがりの救世主は、消失！
656522998.english: Admit it! Your salvation is a farce!

256574606.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
256574606.jp_real: さあ、今こそ審判の時だ！
256574606.en_literal: Then, now is the time for judgment!

732438217.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
732438217.jp_real: 天使長の力を、見せてやる！
732438217.en_literal: I'll show you the power of the Heavenly General!
732438217.english: Behold! The power of the supreme Primarch!

437122479.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
437122479.jp_real: ここで全てを終わらせよう！
437122479.english: Let's end this! For the glory of the skies!

572997367.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
572997367.english: This power links us. Use it well.

76827992.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
76827992.jp_real: みんな！イドに声をかけ続けるんだ！
76827992.en_literal: Everyone! We're going to keep calling out to Id!
76827992.english: Stay focused, everyone! It needs us!

904300593.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
904300593.jp_real: 破壊の力に飲まれるな！移動！
904300593.en_literal: Don't get swallowed by the power of destruction! Io!
904300593.english: Don't let that dragon swallow you, Id!

730134094.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
730134094.jp_real: 攻め続けるぞ！諦めるな！
730134094.en_literal: I'll keep pressing the attack! I won't give up!
730134094.english: Continue the assault! We will prevail!

602491202.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
602491202.jp_real: ルシフェル様！俺に力を！

771375713.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
771375713.en_literal: Alright, that was a good fight.

903222420.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_C
903222420.jp_real: 悪くない！このまま行くぞ！
903222420.english: The tides have turned in our favor!

89447983.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
89447983.jp_real: この気合い、やはり貴様は
89447983.english: Such foul magic... What is she?

742387692.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
742387692.en_literal: Should I move out of the way?

228828400.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
228828400.en_literal: Alright! Let's head to the Sanctuary!

350275335.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
350275335.jp_real: イストリアスから目を離すな！
350275335.en_literal: I won't look away from Istoria.

748043328.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
748043328.english: Through these sands we press on.

712275736.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
712275736.jp_real: 触媒か…必ず手に入れなければ
712275736.en_literal: I must have it... that catalyst.
712275736.english: We will find the catalyst. Mark my words.

189497486.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
189497486.jp_real: この島、何かあるようだな。
189497486.en_literal: This island... seems to have something to it.
189497486.english: This island is hiding something. I can feel it.

284637935.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
284637935.jp_real: 抵抗するなよ！勇者は戦う！
284637935.en_literal: If you resist, the hero will strike!
284637935.english: Spare no mercy for these villains!

228953918.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
228953918.jp_real: これ以上、好きにはさせない！
228953918.en_literal: I won't let you go any further!

325000943.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
325000943.jp_real: 何もかもナンセンスだ

272935668.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
272935668.jp_real: ウロタエルノ！オレニツズケル！
272935668.en_literal: I'll show you how to dance! Follow me!

604198865.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
604198865.english: Onward! The skies are counting on us!

969725460.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
969725460.jp_real: 不気味な塔だが、進むのみだ。
969725460.en_literal: A creepy tower, but we have no choice but to move forward.
969725460.english: What a foul place... But on would we press!

695963650.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_C
695963650.en_literal: I'm still not letting my guard down!

1047619475.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_1
1047619475.jp_real: みんなの力がこれほどとはな
1047619475.en_literal: I can't believe everyone's power has grown this much.

713801617.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_2
713801617.jp_real: みんな、うまくやったな！

523612807.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
523612807.jp_real: みんな、いい連携だった！
523612807.en_literal: Everyone, that was a good link-up.

807416513.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
807416513.en_literal: Everyone, complacency is a death sentence.

648511159.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
648511159.jp_real: 次も皆の力を合わせるぞ！

43065261.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_1
43065261.jp_real: まだまだこんなものではない
43065261.en_literal: Not bad, but this is nothing!
43065261.english: There's more where that came from.

828971046.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
828971046.jp_real: ふむ、面白くなってきた

757182397.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
757182397.english: Indeed, we took the upper hand.

100802525.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_1
100802525.en_literal: Alright, let's prepare for the next one!

826183474.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_2
826183474.jp_real: スピーディーに行くぞ！

16395626.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
16395626.en_literal: Ah, there's no doubt about it.

1072316839.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0000
1072316839.jp_real: 団長、また腕を上げたな
1072316839.en_literal: Captain, you're raising your arm again.

67836315.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
67836315.jp_real: 次も合わせられるか、イオ。
67836315.en_literal: Can you link up again, Io?
67836315.english: Io, you are a powerful ally.

166021867.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
166021867.jp_real: バラの女王にふさわしい一撃だった
166021867.en_literal: That was a blow worthy of the Rose Queen.
166021867.english: I should've known the Rose Queen would be fearsome.

99795402.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
99795402.jp_real: 次にも合わせるぞ、フェリ。
99795402.en_literal: I'll link up with you again, Ferry.

990409153.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
990409153.jp_real: さすがの速さだ、ランスロット。
990409153.en_literal: You're as fast as ever, Lancelot.
990409153.english: It was an honor to see your legendary speed firsthand.

174463675.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0900
174463675.jp_real: 重厚な獲物でよくやる
174463675.en_literal: I'm good at catching big game.

107005218.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
107005218.english: I would follow your flame anywhere.

961266169.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
961266169.jp_real: 感謝する、ジークフリート。

623920605.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
623920605.jp_real: 目で追えなかったんだと
623920605.en_literal: I couldn't have done it without you.
623920605.english: To think even I could not keep up with you.

624240192.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
624240192.jp_real: ふん、ここまでついてこられるとはな。
624240192.en_literal: Hmph. I didn't expect you to follow me this far.
624240192.english: We've come far, but you remain steadfast.

1069368927.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
1069368927.en_literal: You're going to break through with your fists?

859381397.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1600
859381397.en_literal: Zeta, I'm grateful for your support.
859381397.english: Thank you for the support, Zeta.

552487407.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
552487407.jp_real: バザラガ、いい追撃だった
552487407.en_literal: Vaseraga, that was a good twin strike.

802394867.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
802394867.jp_real: 次も頼むぞ、カリオストロ。
802394867.en_literal: I'll leave the next one to you, Cagliostro.

155331379.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
155331379.jp_real: 君の秘めた力は凄まじいな
155331379.english: That hidden power of yours is impressive.

739402133.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
739402133.jp_real: ふん。随分と余裕があるみたいだが。
739402133.en_literal: Hmph. You seem to have quite a bit of leeway.
739402133.english: Seofon, that looked suspiciously easy for you.

469278981.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
469278981.jp_real: 実にシャープな一撃だ
469278981.en_literal: That was a really sharp strike.

380149946.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
380149946.jp_real: なんてパワフルな追撃だ
380149946.english: Such power could rival the Archangels.

276934349.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
276934349.jp_real: 平穏と静寂を、この空にもたらさなければな。
276934349.en_literal: I must bring peace and silence to this sky.
276934349.english: We must bring peace and quiet to the skies.

919950819.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
919950819.jp_real: アーカイブを下がえるとは、見上げたものだ。
919950819.en_literal: I never thought I'd see the day when I'd follow a demon.
919950819.english: Your command over dark powers... it's impressive.

743122105.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
743122105.jp_real: 遥か昔から…君ら六竜は空を守ってきたのだな。
743122105.en_literal: So you six have been protecting the sky since ancient times.
743122105.english: Since time immemorial, the six dragons have protected these skies.

187748799.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
187748799.jp_real: 光の魔法か。相性は悪くなさそうだ。
187748799.en_literal: A light mage, huh? We should get along just fine.
187748799.english: Your light magic is a superb complement to my own.

752918063.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0000
752918063.jp_real: 次はもっと踏み込んでいくぞ！
752918063.english: I sense you're still holding back.

855512084.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
855512084.jp_real: 悪くないな。いい魔法だ。
855512084.en_literal: Not bad. That's a good spell.
855512084.english: Your magic grows ever more fearsome.

118574152.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
118574152.english: Experience is everything. You're proof of that.

979963190.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
979963190.jp_real: エレガントなバラだな

315684978.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
315684978.jp_real: 流麗な動き、まさに水のごとしだな
315684978.en_literal: Your movements are as fluid as water.
315684978.english: Beautiful footwork. Our foes stood no chance.

757002874.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
757002874.jp_real: 決して誰もやらせはしない
757002874.en_literal: I won't let anyone do it!
757002874.english: We can't let even a single foe escape.

194985158.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
194985158.jp_real: よし、スムーズな連携だった
194985158.en_literal: Good job. That was a smooth link.

243475302.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
243475302.english: You put amazing force behind your strikes.

753997338.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
753997338.jp_real: まるでおとろえを感じさせないな
753997338.en_literal: You don't seem to be slowing down at all.
753997338.english: It seems you've only grown more agile with age.

349568795.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
349568795.jp_real: 無駄のない美しい一線だった
349568795.en_literal: It was a beautiful, efficient move.

394770674.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
394770674.jp_real: 素手とは思えん。規格外の破壊力だ。
394770674.en_literal: I can't believe it. It's beyond comprehension.
394770674.english: Such destructive force. Show our foes your strength.

768864618.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
768864618.jp_real: 抜け目のない一撃だった
768864618.en_literal: That was a pretty relentless strike.
768864618.english: Quite the bestial strikes you have.

868131445.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
868131445.jp_real: うん。ヘビーな一撃だな。

33727924.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
33727924.jp_real: 空の民の英知の結晶といったところか
33727924.en_literal: So you're the crystallized wisdom of the people of the sky, then?
33727924.english: They stood no chance against your Skydweller magic.

809926102.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
809926102.english: We must right the wrongs of the past.

685127103.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
685127103.jp_real: 次は本気で行くぞ、シエテ！
685127103.en_literal: Next, I'm going in for real, Seofon.
685127103.english: Seofon, I insist you fight at your actual level next time.

404570966.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
404570966.jp_real: 次も集中していくぞ、ソーン！
404570966.en_literal: I'll keep focusing on the next one too, Tweyen!
404570966.english: Stay vigilant. There's more to be done.

767856333.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
767856333.jp_real: 空中戦もお手の物とはな。
767856333.en_literal: Even aerial combat is within your expertise, huh?
767856333.english: You've a gift with aerial combat.

89431654.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
89431654.jp_real: とっしんりょくはかおう、ベアトリクス
89431654.english: Give them no room to breathe.

342094806.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
342094806.english: I am grateful for your aid.

713289168.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
713289168.jp_real: カッカクタルノミゴトナチカラダ

836765445.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
836765445.jp_real: フェディエル、火星に感謝する

572150019.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_2
572150019.jp_real: 気を引き締めていこう！

498110026.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_3
498110026.en_literal: Don't let your guard down yet!

676151213.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
676151213.jp_real: この俺が、星の民と共闘とはな。
676151213.en_literal: I, of all people... being called a comrade by a star's child?
676151213.english: I never expected to fight alongside an astral again.

864435001.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0000
864435001.jp_real: 集中を切らすなよ、団長
864435001.english: We can't rest easy yet, Captain.

722774398.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
722774398.jp_real: 隙は見せるなよ、カタリナ。

381431851.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
381431851.jp_real: クレバーナイチゲキだった

391903398.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
391903398.en_literal: Don't let your guard down, Io.

976596125.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
976596125.jp_real: ロゼッタ、次も頼めるか？
976596125.en_literal: Rosetta, can I count on you again?
976596125.english: Rosetta, may I have the next dance as well?

107783127.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
107783127.jp_real: うん。隔離用の奴らとは全然違うみたいだな。
107783127.en_literal: Huh. You're nothing like those guys from the Academy.
107783127.english: Hmph. The forces of the dead are truly formidable.

84261684.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
84261684.jp_real: 次もいけるか、ランスロット。
84261684.english: Are you ready for the next fight, Lancelot?

839613784.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
839613784.jp_real: この勢いを忘れるなよ、ヴェイン！
839613784.english: The real battle is just getting started.

401711246.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
401711246.jp_real: そのユニークな鎧、悪くないセンスだ。
401711246.en_literal: That unique armor... not a bad sense of style.
401711246.english: Your armor is quite unique. It suits you.

58336849.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
58336849.jp_real: よし、任せた甲斐があったな。
58336849.en_literal: Good. I'm glad I could leave it to you.
58336849.english: I was correct to trust your swordplay.

332761083.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
332761083.jp_real: 警戒は怠るなよ、シャルロッテ。
332761083.en_literal: Don't let your guard down, Charlotta.

397980136.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
397980136.jp_real: あなたの剣はまさに閃光だな。

1053630903.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
1053630903.jp_real: ナルメア、油断はするなよ
1053630903.en_literal: Narmaya, don't let your guard down.

99912161.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
99912161.en_literal: Great sword! That's where you're wrong!

314777964.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
314777964.jp_real: このまま油断せず行くぞ
314777964.en_literal: I won't let my guard down from here on out!
314777964.english: Let us continue with renewed vigor.

393726655.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
393726655.jp_real: 踏み込みが大胆すぎるようにも見えたが
393726655.en_literal: It seemed a bit too bold of a move...
393726655.english: You attack with such reckless abandon. Should I be concerned?

253090551.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
253090551.jp_real: おう、サンダルフォン。お前がいなければ、俺もここにはいられなかった。ありがとう。
253090551.en_literal: I'm sorry to have troubled you.

310742657.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
310742657.jp_real: イド。君は不機嫌な印象を直した方がいいのでは？
310742657.en_literal: Id, you should probably fix that sour expression of yours.
310742657.english: Id, perhaps we should address your negative image.

1046530608.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
1046530608.jp_real: これが十天収果か。強大な力だ。
1046530608.en_literal: So this is the Ten-Point Seal... a mighty power.
1046530608.english: The Eternals are certainly a mighty bunch.

572896817.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
572896817.english: With your support, I have nothing to fear.

1061163719.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
1061163719.jp_real: ふむ。土の天使ウリエルにも匹敵するパワーだ。
1061163719.en_literal: Hmph. A power that rivals even Uriel, the Angel of Earth.
1061163719.english: Hm. You remind me of Uriel, the Primarch of Earth.

917953393.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
917953393.jp_real: ふん。落ち着いたらコーヒー・ブレイクといこう。
917953393.en_literal: Hmph. Let's call it a coffee break when things calm down.
917953393.english: Shall we break for coffee when time permits?

94700615.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
94700615.jp_real: もう少しスマートさを意識してみては？
94700615.en_literal: Why don't you try being a bit smarter?
94700615.english: What if you tried fighting smarter, not harder?

633362021.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
633362021.jp_real: ブッキラボウに見えて、連携への気配りは完璧か。
633362021.en_literal: You look like a real show-off, but your teamwork is flawless.
633362021.english: To be blunt, you actually work well with others.

298556597.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
298556597.jp_real: よし、スピーディーに片付ける
298556597.en_literal: Alright, let's wrap this up quickly.

652901814.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
652901814.jp_real: もう少し力を抑えてくれると、後始末が楽なんだがな。
652901814.en_literal: If you could hold back a bit more on your power, cleanup would be easier.
652901814.english: If you practiced more restraint, cleanup would be far easier.

842279128.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A
842279128.en_literal: This is the power of an angel!
842279128.english: I am a Primarch after all.

187180786.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
187180786.jp_real: どんな力も使いようだ。貴様なら分かるだろう。
187180786.en_literal: No matter what power you use, you'll understand.
187180786.english: I dare say you know something of awesome power yourself.

139047680.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
139047680.jp_real: もっと素直に頼ってみたらどうだ？
139047680.en_literal: Why don't you try relying on me more honestly?
139047680.english: Should I show you my limits?

376006392.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
376006392.jp_real: 君の魔法のサポートのおかげだ

224982281.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
224982281.en_literal: Don't you dare take my blood!

757707581.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
757707581.jp_real: ロゼッタ、頼りにしてるよ。

228254836.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
228254836.jp_real: スキを作っててくれたおかげだ
228254836.en_literal: Thanks to the path you made for me.
228254836.english: I could say the same of you.

326678251.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
326678251.jp_real: ふん、少し熱くなりすぎたか。
326678251.en_literal: Hmph. Getting a bit too hot, aren't we?
326678251.english: Hmph. Careful. That almost sounded friendly.

267217339.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
267217339.jp_real: ジークフリート。悪なき進化は空の民ゆえか。
267217339.en_literal: Is it because you're a child of the sky that you're so devoid of malice?
267217339.english: I'm sure you're the sky dweller who could actually use them.

797568085.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
797568085.jp_real: どうということはない

891727238.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
891727238.jp_real: ああ、スピーディーにいこう

675924691.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
675924691.jp_real: ふん、迷いはもう振り払ったからな。
675924691.en_literal: I've already shaken off my hesitation.
675924691.english: We can't afford anything less on the battlefield.

52710283.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
52710283.jp_real: 舐めてもらっては困る、カリオストロ。
52710283.en_literal: I'd appreciate it if you didn't lick me, Cagliostro.
52710283.english: High praise from the founder of alchemy herself.

77642909.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
77642909.jp_real: ふん、騒ぐほどでもない
77642909.en_literal: No need to make such a fuss.

934557172.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
934557172.jp_real: 当然のことをしたまでだ
934557172.en_literal: I did what was only natural.

311076684.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
311076684.jp_real: エイイイイ！今はそれどころではない！
311076684.en_literal: Hey! Now's not the time for that!
311076684.english: Don't be absurd! Now's not the time!

367498710.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
367498710.jp_real: この力、皆を守るために振るおう。
367498710.en_literal: Let this power fall to protect everyone.
367498710.english: All for the sake of peace.

34828492.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
34828492.jp_real: その想い、応えてみせよ。

615261698.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
615261698.jp_real: 礼はいらない。次に備えるぞ。
615261698.en_literal: No need for formalities. Let's prepare for what comes next.
615261698.english: Don't mention it. Let us move on.

1027553176.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
1027553176.jp_real: ふん、それはお互い様だ

720984569.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B
720984569.en_literal: I'll do my best to maintain the formation.
720984569.english: Then let's maintain our good form.

53002519.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_2
53002519.english: Hah, I could say the same.

978690198.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
978690198.jp_real: ああ、任せておけ、ローラン。
978690198.en_literal: Ah, leave it to me, Rolan.
978690198.english: Your wish is my command, Rolan.

401354811.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
401354811.jp_real: ああ、出し惜しみはせん
401354811.english: Quiet. I would keep your distance.

566236429.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
566236429.jp_real: 見くびってもらっては困る
566236429.en_literal: I'd be in trouble if you looked down on me.
566236429.english: I've spent much time watching over these skies.

538252356.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
538252356.jp_real: ああ、くれぐれも油断はするなよ
538252356.en_literal: Ah, don't let your guard down.

992740275.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
992740275.jp_real: 女流を惜しむ理由もないのだな
992740275.en_literal: There's no reason to hold back my power.
992740275.english: This crew is under my protection.

357329906.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
357329906.jp_real: あの御方から受け継いだ力だ
357329906.en_literal: It's the power I inherited from that person.

740542314.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
740542314.jp_real: ふん、君こそこのレベルの動きは造作もないはずだが
740542314.en_literal: Hmph. You, of all people, shouldn't be able to move at this level.
740542314.english: Unless my eyes deceive me, you're capable of the same speed.

461161757.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
461161757.jp_real: ヴェイン、聞こえてるか？

560125024.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
560125024.jp_real: ミカエルの人も異なる、闘志のこもった熱さを感じるな。
560125024.en_literal: I can feel the intense heat of a different kind of "Mikael" - the heat of a warrior's spirit.
560125024.english: It burns different to me, Kyle's. As if it's fueled by lordly passion.

211556163.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
211556163.jp_real: 何時に福音を授けよう
211556163.en_literal: I'll grant you salvation at any hour.

1054960427.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
1054960427.jp_real: もう迷うことはないさ。
1054960427.en_literal: There's no need to hesitate anymore.
1054960427.english: Hmm. Truer words were never spoken.

435369340.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
435369340.english: I could say the same of you, Narmaya.

82439755.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
82439755.jp_real: この領略、空の民でありながらウリエルに試験するか。
82439755.en_literal: You dare test me, Uriel, with this power?
82439755.english: This sky dweller could give Uriel a run for his money.

791161674.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
791161674.jp_real: まったく、しらじらしいにも程がある
791161674.english: That act of yours endears you to no one.

16717143.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
16717143.jp_real: これはまだほんの一部にすぎないがな
16717143.en_literal: This is still just the tip of the iceberg.
16717143.english: And this was only a fraction of my capabilities.

19324505.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
19324505.jp_real: ああ、今の感覚を忘れるなよ
19324505.english: I like to leave a bold impression.

308510468.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
308510468.jp_real: ……死なさだめするような目で見るのはやめてくれ
308510468.en_literal: Stop looking at me with those eyes that seem to judge my fate.
308510468.english: General, consider not staring at me with such bloodlust.

320969077.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
320969077.jp_real: 特別に甘さをプラスしておいた。口に合えばいいが。
320969077.en_literal: I've added a special sweetness to it. I hope it's to your liking.
320969077.english: I made it extra sweet. Your taste buds will thank me.

324216743.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
324216743.jp_real: ああ、さんざん迷った先に今の俺がある
324216743.en_literal: Ah... the path I wandered so aimlessly has led me to who I am now.

788211080.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
788211080.jp_real: よければ後で一杯ふるまう
788211080.en_literal: If you're feeling up to it, let's have a drink later.
788211080.english: I'll treat you to a cup after we've cleaned up here.

35767510.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
35767510.jp_real: まだまだ余裕のようだな
35767510.en_literal: You still seem to have some leeway.
35767510.english: You're just toying with them at this point.

505242605.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
505242605.jp_real: イオセ、ムズカユクテカナワン
505242605.en_literal: You're too much of a pain to deal with.
505242605.english: Thank you. Now who else wants our wrath?

475654855.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
475654855.jp_real: ふん。ミスミス逃してやるわけにもいかないだろ。
475654855.en_literal: Heh, I can't just let you get away with that.
475654855.english: Is there any other way to strike?

41955055.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
41955055.jp_real: かつては俺も憧れたものだよ
41955055.en_literal: Heh. There was a time when I admired that too.
41955055.english: I was once envious of them too.

258650674.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
258650674.english: Let's focus on the task at hand, please.

775326837.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
775326837.jp_real: バラの女王に褒められるとは、光栄だ。
775326837.en_literal: To be praised by the Queen of Roses... what an honor.
775326837.english: That's high praise coming from the Rose Queen herself.

404726246.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
404726246.jp_real: ああ、任せておけ、ランスロット。
404726246.en_literal: Hah! Leave it to me, Lancelot!

70222524.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
70222524.jp_real: 思いの強さならば、君らにも遅れは取らないつもりだ。
70222524.en_literal: If I'm going to keep up with you guys, I've got to match your strength of will.
70222524.english: In strength of loyalty, you are already second to none.

998978785.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
998978785.jp_real: 当然だ。舐めてもらっては困る。
998978785.en_literal: Of course. I'd be in trouble if you underestimated me.
998978785.english: There's no rest for the wicked.

159344331.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
159344331.jp_real: 清き志か。俺には過ぎた言葉だ。
159344331.en_literal: A pure will...? That's a word I've already surpassed.
159344331.english: Only the righteous... I... I wonder if that includes me.

654566725.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
654566725.jp_real: まだまだこんなものではないぞ。剣の大きなよ。
654566725.en_literal: I'm not done yet. I'm not done with this sword.
654566725.english: And they shall have what for again and again until none remain.

407983671.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
407983671.jp_real: いいだろう。任せておけ。

645828183.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
645828183.jp_real: 礼などいらん。次に備えるぞ。
645828183.en_literal: No need for formalities. Let's prepare for what comes next.

98750895.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
98750895.jp_real: いいだろ、バザラガ。俺もあとに続こう。
98750895.en_literal: Fine by me, Vaseraga. I'll follow you too.

83874414.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
83874414.jp_real: この羽の重み、他者に背負わせることは考えていない。
83874414.en_literal: I never thought of burdening others with the weight of these wings.
83874414.english: I wouldn't put this burden on anyone.

69324630.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
69324630.english: Where would you be without us?

145250074.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
145250074.english: Let me stop you right there.

606891805.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
606891805.jp_real: そんな約束はしていない
606891805.en_literal: I never made such a promise.

438100531.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
438100531.jp_real: 託された想いを手放しはしない。決して。
438100531.en_literal: I won't let go of the feelings I've hidden. Never.
438100531.english: It's more valuable than you could ever know.

289060554.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
289060554.jp_real: 悪くない連携だったな

824562017.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
824562017.jp_real: アテにしてくれて構わない
824562017.en_literal: I don't mind being counted on.

780390337.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
780390337.jp_real: 世界を終わらせる救済など、間違っている。
780390337.en_literal: You're mistaken about a salvation that ends the world.
780390337.english: It takes a greater strength to protect than to destroy.

686741572.label: PL2100_vo_SP_oc_talk1_1
686741572.jp_real: すべての最悪に終止符を！
686741572.en_literal: Let's put an end to all the worst!
686741572.english: I am the end of all calamity!

131465014.label: PL2100_vo_SP_oc_talk2_1
131465014.jp_real: ああ、インソフウォール！

83035394.label: PL2100_vo_SP_pl_offset1_1
83035394.jp_real: 願いを、約束を、俺は守る！
83035394.en_literal: I'll protect your wishes, your promises!
83035394.english: Guide me, direct me, by your light!

330188199.jp_real: ああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああ

940728642.jp_real: ハァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァ

753526504.jp_real: オオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオ

242593282.label: PN2100_vo_ATK_ability_3_charge_3
242593282.en_literal: It's the power of an angel!
242593282.english: By the light of the angels!

368081983.label: PN2100_vo_ATK_ability_4_4
368081983.en_literal: I won't let your wish be extinguished.

151832014.label: PN2100_vo_DMG_default_m_2
151832014.jp_real: ゲヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘ
